post.summary: Modify settings in a single location
post.description: Modify settings in a single location

This endpoint allows you to add a new workplace/location to your existing Deputy install. | **Data element** | **Requirements** | **Notes** | | --- | --- | --- | | strWorkplaceName | String naming the workplace | | | stWorkplaceTimezone | Timezone for the workplace using TZ database naming | See [this](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones) website for information
| | strAddress | String of the locations address | | | strLat | The latitude of the location using a string | | | strLon | The longitude of the location using a string | | | intCountry | An integer which defines which country the location is in | | | arrAreaNames | An array of the area names to add to the location | Example : \['Chef', 'Cashier'\] | | strWorkplaceCode | A string with a length of 3 allowing you to define a short code for the location | | | strParentCompany | Name or integer id of the company the location belongs to | Optional | | strPayrollExportCode | String naming what to use as a code for payroll exports to applications such as Xero | Optional | | blnIsWorkplace | Whether the location is considered a workplace | Boolean
1 - True
0 - False | | blnIsPayrollEntity | Whether the location has payroll setup | Boolean
1- True
0 - False | **Example** ``` json { "strWorkplaceName": "Simons Sambos - Sydney", "strWorkplaceTimezone": "Australia/Sydney", "strAddress": "580 George St", "strLat": "151.2093", "strLon": "33.8688", "intCountry": 13, "arrAreaNames": ["Chef", "Cashier"], "strWorkplaceCode": "SYD", "strPayrollExportCode": "SYDEXPORT", "blnIsWorkplace": 1, "blnIsPayrollEntity": 1 } ```

intAgreementId.description: Identifier of an EmployeeAgreement to assign if it exists for the given Employee. Omit this to create a new agreement

blnSetPrimary.description: Sets the Employees Primary Location & Employee Workplace to that of the provided Company Id. Omit this to keep existing allocations

items.description: Array of User IDs (Not employee ids) to get the memo

strComment.description: Text to include in the journal

intEmployeeId.description: Which employee record should have this journal added

ApprovalComment.description: Any comment left regarding approval of leave

intCompanyId.description: Record id of location to add employee to

intGender.description: 0 - Prefer not to say, 1 - Male, 2 - Female, 3 - Non-Binary

strCountryCode.description: The country code for the employees address. This can be found in country resource API

strPayrollId.description: Payroll id to set for the employee

strCountryCode.description: Country code for the award. Can be find in the awards library list

strAwardCode.description: The award code for the library award to apply.

items.description: All record ids of employment agreements to be updated with this request. If not included all agreements for the employee will be updated.

intCompanyId.description: Id of location the area should be added to

strExportName.description: Payroll export name to be used for the area

intSortOrder.description: Order that the areas will appear in Deputy. If for example this is 0, it will list this area first and changing the order of the existing areas

intOpunitType.description: Designates if the area should have geo coordinates set. 0 - Default, 1 - Area with Geo

LocationId.description: Id of the location for the area.

intCompanyId.description: Id of the location the areas are for

strOpunitName.description: The name of the area being added

intAddressId.description: The id record of the address resource being associated to the area

arrTrainingId.description: Array of training id records employees must have to work in this area

intCountry.description: Country code for the area. Can be found using the country code resource

intOpunitType.description: Designates if the area should have a geo attached. 0 - Default, 1 - Geo based area

strExportName.description: The payroll export code for the area

intSortOrder.description: Defines the order that the areas appear in dropdown lists within Deputy

strFromDate.description: Start date of roster in format YYYY-MM-DD

strToDate.description: End date of roster in format YYYY-MM-DD

blnRequireErrorDetails.description: Require error details or not. 0 - No, 1 - Yes

blnAllLocationsMode.description: Whether to publish all locations rosters with this request. 0 - No, 1 - Yes

intRosterArray.description: Array of roster ids to be published with this request
Array of the roster id records to discard as part of this request

intTimesheetId.description: Record id of the timesheet to stop

intMealbreakMinute.description: Number of minutes taken as a meal break in the timesheet period

intOpunitId.description: The id of the location the area the timesheet is for

intEmployeeId.description: The id record of the employee for who the timesheet is for

intTimesheetId.description: The id of the timesheet to pause

intMealbreakMinute.description: The number of minutes taken as a meal break in the pause

timestamp.description: Timestamp in unix time of when the transaction occured

area.description: The id of the area that should be associated with the transaction

type.description: The type of transaction. MANUAL or ACTUAL

reference.description: Unique reference for the transaction. If reference is not unique it will overwrite previous transaction

employee.description: The id of the employee to be associated with the transaction

location.description: The id of the location to be associated with the transaction

field.description: The field to run the search on

type.description: The type of search to run for example eq = equals, gt = greater than

data.description: The data to search for. For example a record id of 1

tags.name: Logged in User Details
tags.description:
# All about "Me"

This set of API endpoints allow you to retrieve data about the authenticated user the API token relates too. You can find information out such as locations the user is able to work, their contact details, current rosters and timesheets just to name a few options.

In many cases you can also provide updates to this profile via the API. For example there are endpoints which allow you to update a contact address or photo.
